title: Chest Search
description: Adds a search bar to chests and such.
body:
Adds a search bar to make finding items in your chests easier.

Additional configuration available in chest search category in game settings.

**Requires Halplibe 5.2.4 or above.**
***
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!_

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YK3rYIDU/images/2f1d6557e165ca59a1fac0b04b46ff1e61f8da93.gif)
